description_long: This factory building complex features a weathered, multi-structure layout with a main two-story building clad in aged wooden siding and a sloped shingle roof. Adjacent to it is a brick structure with a flat roof, topped by a small watchtower or control room, and surrounded by industrial tanks and piping enclosed by a wooden fence. The site includes a tall metal windmill, utility poles with overhead wires, and scattered deciduous trees, adding to the industrial yet semi-rural atmosphere. A dirt road curves through the property, passing under a covered loading area supported by wooden posts. The exterior shows signs of age and use, with rusted tanks, stacked lumber, and a mix of metal and wood construction materials. The overall scene suggests a mid-20th-century light industrial or agricultural processing facility, blending utilitarian design with practical outdoor features.
description: A weathered, multi-building factory complex with wood and brick structures, industrial tanks, a windmill, and utility poles, set among sparse trees and a dirt road. The site exudes a rustic, utilitarian industrial character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden building, the windmill, utility poles, and the entrance to the dirt road with visible stacked lumber and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick structure with the rooftop watchtower, industrial tanks, and the covered loading area beneath the tower.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the fenced industrial tanks, the brick building, and the back of the main wooden structure, with more of the yard visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main wooden building's side, the fenced tanks, and the windmill, with the watchtower in the background.
